category_sources: Official docs https://hatch.pypa.io/latest/ call Hatch a modern, extensible Python project manager.
source_facts.description says Hatch is modern, extensible Python project management.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository README heading uses Hatch.
Official docs page title and heading use Hatch.
docs_sources: Official README links to the documentation at hatch.pypa.io.
source_facts.homepage is the dedicated official Hatch documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from the official Hatch docs GitHub link and official README at https://github.com/pypa/hatch.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics include python, plugin, cli, build, packaging, versioning, and virtualenv.
Official docs describe build system, environments, Python management, testing, publishing, versioning, project generation, and CLI features.
